name: list_providers
description: List the configured local model runtime providers (Ollama, LM Studio) with their host, whether they are detected/live, and their capabilities. Optionally filter to a single provider.

provider.description: Optional provider id to filter to

name: list_models
description: List models installed/available on each detected provider. Without a provider arg, aggregates across all detected providers keyed by provider.

name: list_loaded
description: List models currently loaded into memory on each detected provider. Without a provider arg, aggregates across all detected providers keyed by provider.

name: model_info
description: Show detailed metadata for a specific model (family, parameter size, quantization, context length). Without a provider arg, queries all detected providers.

name: pull_model
description: HEAVY: Download/pull a model onto a provider. WARNING: this may download multiple gigabytes and can take a long time. Without a provider arg, attempts the pull on every detected provider.

name: remove_model
description: DESTRUCTIVE: Permanently delete a model from a provider. Requires confirm:true; without it the action is refused. The provider argument is required so a delete cannot fan out across every detected runtime.

confirm.description: Must be true to perform this destructive deletion

provider.description: Required provider id (delete is scoped to a single provider)

name: load_model
description: Load a model into memory so it is ready for inference. Optionally set keepAlive (e.g. '5m', '1h'). Without a provider arg, loads on every detected provider.

keepAlive.description: How long to keep the model resident, e.g. '5m'

name: unload_model
description: Unload a model from memory to free VRAM/RAM. Without a provider arg, unloads from every detected provider.

name: health_check
description: Check whether each provider's local runtime is reachable and report its version. Without a provider arg, checks all configured providers.

name: system_resources
description: Report local hardware resources: platform, total/free RAM, CPU count, and detected GPUs with VRAM. Used to reason about which models can run locally.

name: fit_check
description: Determine whether a model fits on the local hardware. Resolves the model size from the provider or the static catalog (or an explicit sizeBytes), then compares against free GPU VRAM, falling back to system RAM. Returns fits, target (gpu/cpu/none), required and available bytes.

sizeBytes.description: Optional explicit model size in bytes (overrides lookup)

name: benchmark
description: HEAVY: Runs REAL inference. Executes one small completion against a loaded/loadable model and measures latency (ms) and throughput (tokens/sec). This consumes compute and may load the model. Without a provider arg, runs on the first detected provider.

prompt.description: Optional prompt; a short default is used otherwise

name: search_available
description: Search the built-in catalog of well-known local models by name, family, or task. Note: this searches a curated static catalog, not the full live Ollama library (https://ollama.com/library).

query.description: Search text matched against model name, family, and tasks

name: suggest_model
description: Recommend local models for a task (chat/code/embed/vision/reasoning/general), ranked by task match and then by whether they fit the detected free GPU VRAM or system RAM. Returns a ranked list with fit flags.

task.description: The task you want a model for

name: complete
description: DELEGATED INFERENCE: Offload a text/chat completion to a local model runtime for cost savings and privacy (data never leaves the machine). This is NOT a chat feature for the user; it delegates work to a local LLM. Provide either prompt or messages. Without a provider arg, uses the first detected provider.

model.description: Model id/name to run the completion on

name: embed
description: DELEGATED EMBEDDINGS: Offload embedding generation to a local model runtime for cost savings and privacy. Accepts a single string or an array of strings. Without a provider arg, uses the first detected provider.

input.description: Text or array of texts to embed
